pi_items.source: Matches task description line specifying save location; confirmed in setup_task.sh and export_result.sh

Code verification: Actual DXF files with all required elements are 4.9KB-16.4KB. The 500-byte threshold is a reasonable loose floor to detect empty/corrupted files. Verified in export_result.sh and verifier.py which both check file_size > 500.

DXF Standard AutoCAD Color Index: 1=Red, 2=Yellow, 3=Green, 4=Cyan, 5=Blue, 6=Magenta, 7=White. Verified via https://ezdxf.readthedocs.io/en/stable/concepts/aci.html and https://gohtx.com/acadcolors.php
Task description explicitly states: 'Draw a closed rectangle from (0, 0) to (100, 80) representing the board perimeter.'
Task description: rectangle from (0,0) to (100,80). Width = 100-0 = 100mm, Height = 80-0 = 80mm. Verified mathematically against coordinate specification.
DXF Standard AutoCAD Color Index: 1=Red. Verified via https://ezdxf.readthedocs.io/en/stable/concepts/aci.html
Task description explicitly states: 'Draw 4 circles of diameter 3.2 mm (radius 1.6 mm) centered at: (5, 5), (95, 5), (5, 75), (95, 75)'
Task description explicitly lists 4 hole locations: (5,5), (95,5), (5,75), (95,75)
DXF Standard AutoCAD Color Index: 2=Yellow. Verified via https://ezdxf.readthedocs.io/en/stable/concepts/aci.html
Task description explicitly states: 'Draw a closed rectangle from (10, 10) to (90, 70) representing the component placement boundary.'
Task description: rectangle from (10,10) to (90,70). Width = 90-10 = 80mm, Height = 70-10 = 60mm. Verified mathematically against coordinate specification.

privileged_info_summary: The PCB board outline task is a synthetic CAD drawing task created in LibreCAD. The task requires creating three layers with verified geometric and color specifications: Board_Outline (white rectangle 100x80mm at origin), Mounting_Holes (4 red circles with 1.6mm radius), and Keepout_Zone (yellow rectangle 80x60mm). All metadata color indices are verified to match the DXF standard AutoCAD Color Index (ACI): color 1=Red, color 2=Yellow, color 7=White. All geometric dimensions and coordinates are mathematically verified against the task description. The minimum file size threshold of 500 bytes is reasonable for detecting empty or corrupted DXF files, while actual DXF output files are expected to be 4.9-16.4KB. Output file should be saved to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/pcb_outline.dxf.
